title: Jamaican Chicken Curry Pasta
description: A fusion of Italian and Jamaican flavors, this dish combines spicy Jamaican curry with tender chicken and a side of pasta.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the Jamaican curry powder to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth and heavy cream to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Return the chicken to the skillet and cook until cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
Combine the cooked pasta, chicken, and curry sauce in a large bowl.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, topped with parmesan cheese.
